summary: Completed testing of registration form improvements for Addrika. All 6 backend tests passed. UI tests verified field order (Title → Full Name, Gender → DOB → Anniversary), new fields presence, Title-Gender auto-mapping, and hint texts. Duplicate email AND phone checks confirmed working.

1_field_order_title_before_fullname.details: Row 1: Title * (dropdown) is positioned before Full Name * input field

2_field_order_gender_after_fullname.details: Row 2: Gender * → Date of Birth * → Anniversary (Optional)

3_date_of_birth_required.details: Date of Birth field has 'required' HTML attribute, label shows asterisk (*)

4_anniversary_optional_with_hint.details: Anniversary field is optional (no required attribute), shows 'For gift codes' hint text

5_alternate_phone_optional_with_hint.details: Alternate Phone field is optional, shows 'For delivery backup' hint text

6_duplicate_email_check.details: Sending OTP to existing email returns 400 with 'Email already registered. Please login instead.'

7_duplicate_phone_check.details: Registration with existing phone (even with different email) returns 400 with 'This phone number is already registered with another account'

8_title_gender_auto_mapping.details: Mr. → Male, Mrs./Ms. → Female; Male → Mr., Female → Ms. (bi-directional auto-update)

9_registration_with_all_new_fields.details: Successfully registered user with DOB, Anniversary, Alternate Phone, Landmark fields

10_registration_without_optional_fields.details: Successfully registered user without optional fields (anniversary, alternate phone)

critical_code_review_comments: auth.py lines 255-265: Duplicate phone check uses regex pattern to match phone regardless of country code prefix - good implementation
AuthPage.jsx lines 560-628: Title and Gender fields have bi-directional auto-update logic - well implemented
auth_service.py: create_user function properly accepts all new fields (alternate_phone, date_of_birth, date_of_marriage, landmark)
RegisterWithOTP model properly defines all new fields with appropriate Optional types
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users during duplicate prevention tests with random email/phone patterns
context_for_next_testing_agent: Registration form improvements verified: 1) Field order: Title → Full Name (Row 1), Gender → DOB → Anniversary (Row 2). 2) DOB is required, Anniversary and Alternate Phone are optional with hint texts. 3) Duplicate check works for BOTH email (at OTP send) AND phone (at registration). 4) Title-Gender auto-mapping works bi-directionally. All features working as specified.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working as expected
